title: Fix phantom delegatee vulnerability
description: Add delegatee Merkle inclusion check to the Delegation circuit. Currently the delegatee credential commitment is a private input with no proof it exists in any tree.

title: Add human tree root history buffer
description: Add a root history buffer for humanTree matching agentTree's existing 30-root buffer. Currently proofs go stale immediately on any new enrollment.

title: Scope commitment blinding salt
description: Replace Poseidon2(bitmask, credCmt) with Poseidon3(bitmask, credCmt, blindingSalt) to prevent brute-force of the 64-bit scope space.

title: Formal verification circuit invariants
description: Write invariant properties for all 3 circuits: no field overflow, nullifier uniqueness, scope monotonicity across delegation chain.

title: Constraint-level fuzzer
description: Build a fuzzer that generates random valid/invalid witness inputs and checks that valid witnesses produce valid proofs and invalid witnesses are rejected.

title: Recursive delegation via Nova folding
description: Replace iterative delegation hops with a single recursive SNARK (Nova folding). One proof covers the entire delegation chain regardless of depth.

title: Platform attestation circuit
description: New circuit verifying an agent runs on attested hardware (TPM/SEV/TDX) by checking a platform certificate chain inside the circuit.

title: Behavioral sybil resistance circuit
description: Proves a human exhibits sufficient behavioral entropy (typing cadence, interaction patterns) without revealing raw data. Upgrades from proof-of-enrollment to proof-of-human-ness.

title: Cross-chain verification bridge
description: Deploy verification on a second chain and implement cross-chain root sync via storage proof or light client attestation.

title: Off-chain verification with on-chain checkpoints
description: Generate proofs off-chain, batch them, post a Merkle root of verified sessions on-chain at intervals. 100x gas reduction for high-throughput.

title: @bolyra/sdk TypeScript core
description: Core SDK: createIdentity(), enrollHuman(), enrollAgent(), proveHandshake(), verifyHandshake(), delegate(). Full TypeScript types. <10 lines to hello-world.

title: bolyra Python SDK
description: PyPI package wrapping snarkjs via subprocess. Same API surface as TypeScript. Targets LangChain/CrewAI developers.

title: LangChain BolyraAuthTool
description: BaseTool wrapping the SDK for mutual auth before sensitive operations. Structured output for agent chains.

title: CrewAI delegation integration
description: Maps CrewAI task delegation to Bolyra delegation circuit. Agents can delegate with cryptographically enforced scope narrowing.

title: Descriptive error codes
description: Replace generic revert strings with descriptive error codes including the specific failure reason (stale root, revoked identity, etc.).

title: IETF internet-draft core spec
description: Core protocol specification with RFC 2119 keywords. Sections: Introduction, Terminology, Protocol Overview, Circuit Specifications, Wire Format, Security Considerations.

title: W3C DID method binding
description: Map Bolyra identities to did:bolyra:<commitment>. Define DID Document structure, resolution algorithm, VC issuance flow for handshake results.

title: Conformance test suite
description: 50+ JSON test vectors covering: valid handshake, expired credential, revoked human, stale root, scope mismatch, delegation chain (1/3/4 hops), cross-chain root.

title: ABNF wire format grammar
description: Machine-parseable ABNF grammar for proof payloads, public signals, enrollment requests, delegation tokens.

title: NIST SP 800-63B alignment
description: Map Bolyra authentication factors to AAL2/AAL3 authenticator assurance levels under NIST Digital Identity Guidelines.
